ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $User.Id = '0054J000002PIdC' || $User.Id = '0054J000002Q8am' || $User.Id = '0054J000002QSkU' || $User.Id = '0054J000004QaYN' || $User.Id = '0054J000004RQEhQAO') && AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Assuta_360", ISPICKVAL(Status, "סגירת אירוע אוטומטית"), ISBLANK(TEXT(Reason)) )
